authorities.title: Regulation (EC) No 396/2005 on maximum residue levels of pesticides
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for pesticide residue limits in food and feed.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) No 283/2013 on data requirements for active substances
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for active-substance data requirements relevant to pesticide dossiers.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/915 on maximum levels for certain contaminants in food
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for PFAS maximum levels in certain foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Recommendation (EU) 2022/1431 on the monitoring of perfluoroalkyl substances in food
notes: EU monitoring recommendation retained separately from binding contaminant limits.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2017/2158 establishing mitigation measures and benchmark levels for the reduction of the presence of acrylamide in food
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for mitigation measures and benchmark levels related to acrylamide in food.

authorities.title: Commission Recommendation (EU) 2019/1888 on the monitoring of the presence of acrylamide in certain foods
notes: EU monitoring recommendation retained separately from binding acrylamide mitigation requirements.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2024/3190 on the use of BPA and other bisphenols in certain materials and articles intended to come into contact with food
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for BPA and hazardous bisphenol restrictions in certain food-contact materials and articles.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/915 on maximum levels for certain contaminants in food
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for cadmium maximum levels in certain foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/915 on maximum levels for certain contaminants in food
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for lead maximum levels in certain foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2025/1891 amending Regulation (EU) 2023/915 as regards maximum levels of inorganic arsenic in fish and other seafood
notes: Current specific EU legal anchor for inorganic arsenic maximum levels in fish and other seafood.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EC) No 333/2007 laying down the methods of sampling and analysis for the official control of the levels of trace elements and processing contaminants in foodstuffs
notes: Shared EU official-control legal anchor for cadmium sampling and analysis in foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EC) No 333/2007 laying down the methods of sampling and analysis for the official control of the levels of trace elements and processing contaminants in foodstuffs
notes: Shared EU official-control legal anchor for lead sampling and analysis in foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EC) No 333/2007 laying down the methods of sampling and analysis for the official control of the levels of trace elements and processing contaminants in foodstuffs
notes: Shared EU official-control legal anchor for inorganic arsenic sampling and analysis in foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/915 on maximum levels for certain contaminants in food
notes: Primary EU legal anchor for mercury maximum levels in certain foodstuffs.

authorities.title: Commission Regulation (EC) No 333/2007 laying down the methods of sampling and analysis for the official control of the levels of trace elements and processing contaminants in foodstuffs
notes: Shared EU official-control legal anchor for mercury sampling and analysis in foodstuffs.

authorities.title: 40 CFR Part 180 - Tolerances and Exemptions for Pesticide Chemical Residues in Food
notes: Primary US legal anchor for pesticide tolerances managed by EPA.

authorities.title: FDA Compliance Policy Guides (CPG) - Action Levels for Poisonous or Deleterious Substances in Human Food and Animal Feed
notes: US FDA action-level guidance for evaluating food contaminants.
Governed explicitly separately from binding EPA tolerances.

authorities.title: National Food Safety Standard - Maximum Residue Limits for Pesticides in Food
notes: Primary Chinese legal anchor for pesticide maximum residue limits.

authorities.title: National Food Safety Standard - Maximum Levels of Contaminants in Foods
notes: Primary Chinese legal anchor for contaminants such as heavy metals.

authorities.title: Food Sanitation Act - Specifications and Standards for Foods, Food Additives, etc.
notes: Primary Japanese legal anchor for pesticide maximum residue limits managed by MHLW.

authorities.title: Pest Control Products Act - Maximum Residue Limits for Pesticides
notes: Primary Canadian legal anchor for pesticide maximum residue limits managed by PMRA.
